oracle_actual_window.basis: Emitted PULSE(0 3.3 0 1u 1u 5us 10us) trapezoid average = 3.3*(5us+1us)/10us = 1.980V (effective 60% duty). Documents oracle bug #59; NOT the correct answer.

would_pass_checks.basis: Correct: V_avg = D*Vstep = (ton/period)*3.3 = 0.5*3.3 = 1.650V. Blocked by #59 (compiler emits 60% effective duty). Runner asserts the mean is NOT in this window.
